claims.summary: The artifact predicate is binary and determines whether non-marker remainder exists for cleanup placement.
claims.disposition: verify its narrow decision role rather than treating it as the full meaning model

claims.summary: High-entropy or structure-only remainder needs graded density evidence.
claims.disposition: verify the separate remainder texture and surface semantic density diagnostics

claims.summary: Nested quote and boundary placement can affect artifact classification.
claims.disposition: verify current quote-pair and contextual-placement regressions

claims.summary: Changing the predicate return type to f32 would alter cleanup contracts.
claims.disposition: retain as a separately reviewed provider-behavior change; current parallel density evidence answers the diagnostic need
